# Crates published to crates.io, in the order they must be published.
#
# This file is the single source of truth: publish-crates.yml walks it, and
# scripts/check-publish-coverage.sh fails CI when it does not match exactly the
# publishable members of the workspace. A crate is "publishable" unless its
# Cargo.toml sets `publish = false`, so adding a new crate to the workspace
# either adds a line here or breaks the build — it can no longer be forgotten
# and discovered missing from crates.io after a release.
#
# Order is dependency order and is maintained by hand. cargo publish blocks
# until each crate is indexed, so a sequential walk needs no delays. Two
# constraints are not obvious from the dependency graph at a glance:
#
#   - buffa-descriptor precedes buffa-types, because buffa-types' `reflect`
#     feature has an optional buffa-descriptor dependency and cargo publish
#     requires optional deps to resolve from the index too.
#   - buffa is first: everything else depends on it.
#
# A crate deliberately not released sets `publish = false` in its Cargo.toml
# (buffa-yaml does) rather than being omitted from this file.

buffa
buffa-descriptor
buffa-types
buffa-codegen
buffa-build
buffa-remote-derive
protoc-gen-buffa
protoc-gen-buffa-packaging
